default.heading: Hot Potato
default.body: Don't get caught holding the potato when it blows!

default.heading: Pass It!
default.body: One phone is the potato. Your screen shows who to pass it to, so hand them the phone fast.

default.heading: Accept It!
default.body: When the potato reaches you, tap Accept on the phone. Don't delay!

default.heading: Boom!
default.body: When the hidden timer hits zero, the holder explodes and the round gets judged.

default.heading: Vote on Delays
default.body: After the boom, vote on who slowed the chain down. Slow accepters get penalized!
